channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → BELARUS : Employ aerial weapons (Kaliningrad, Kaliningradskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Employ aerial weapons. Actors: RUSSIA / BELARUS. Location: Kaliningrad, Kaliningradskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] INTELLIGENCE → MILITARY : Occupy territory (Lebanon)
item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: INTELLIGENCE / MILITARY. Location: Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → PALESTINIAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Merimbula, New South Wales, Australia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / PALESTINIAN. Location: Merimbula, New South Wales, Australia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (California, United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / nan. Location: California, United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [刚果(金)冲突] DEMOCRATIC REPUBLIC OF THE CONGO → nan : Demonstrate or rally (Rubare, Congo, Democratic Republic of The (general), Democratic Republic Of The Congo)
item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: DEMOCRATIC REPUBLIC OF THE CONGO / nan. Location: Rubare, Congo, Democratic Republic of The (general), Democratic Republic Of The Congo. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [台海局势] STUDENT → nan : Occupy territory (Taiwan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: STUDENT / nan. Location: Taiwan. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] nan → RUSSIA : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (France)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: nan / RUSSIA. Location: France. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → LEBANON : Fight with artillery and tanks (United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: ISRAELI / LEBANON. Location: United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Attempt to assassinate. Actors: GUNMAN / PRESIDENT. Location: Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -8.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.
